channel.title: OOIR Trends: Clinical Medicine (Integrative & Complementary Medicine)
channel.description: Aktuelle Paper-Trends im Bereich Clinical Medicine (Integrative & Complementary Medicine) von OOIR (mit Titel und Metadaten von Crossref)

item.title: Damage-induced muscle regeneration after exercise in humans: Modulatory effects of ginsenoside Rg1
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 14 Autoren: Andrew Mark Edwards, Peggy Pui Lai Or, Chien-Wen Hou, Chih-Yang Huang, Chen Zheng, Fenghua Sun, Xinmin Liu, Kunanya Masodsai, Chia-Hua Kuo Journal: Journal of Traditional and Complementary Medicine Veröffentlicht: 2026-07-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.jtcme.2026.04.002 ISSN: 2225-4110 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-23

item.title: Role of an Ayurvedic formulation ‘Kalyanaka Ghrita’ in mild cognitive impairment: A single-patient, quasi-randomized, controlled, open-label N-of-1 trial
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 13 Autoren: Swati Sharma, Arun Kaushik, Sankha Shubhra Chakrabarti, Kishor Patwardhan Journal: Journal of Ethnopharmacology Veröffentlicht: 2026-12-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.jep.2026.122089 ISSN: 0378-8741 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-23

item.title: Network meta-analysis of different traditional Chinese medicine therapies as adjuvant treatments for Alzheimer's disease
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Zongbao Li, Xiuhua Bai, Jiping Li, Wenyi Geng, Xin Xing, Jianqing Liang, Jintian Li, Juan Li Journal: Complementary Therapies in Clinical Practice Veröffentlicht: 2026-08-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.ctcp.2026.102075 ISSN: 1744-3881 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-23

item.title: Polyphenols extracted from Lycium barbarum seeds regulate gut microbiota to improve type 2 diabetes mellitus in db/db mice
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 7 Autoren: Juntao Zhang, Rongyi Gong, Yichen Liu, Jianjun Deng, Jinfeng Wang, Haixia Yang Journal: Phytomedicine Veröffentlicht: 2026-09-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.phymed.2026.158507 ISSN: 0944-7113 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-23

item.title: Research Ethics and Integrity and the Different Forms of Misconduct: Applications and Challenges in Traditional, Complementary, and Integrative Medicine Research
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Integrative & Complementary Medicine Score: 5 Autoren: Keya Sultanaamin, Lynda G. Balneaves, Saravana Kumar, Matthew J. Leach, Kuan-Pin Su, Yasamin Veziari, Jon Wardle, Holger Cramer, Jeremy Y. Ng Journal: Integrative Medicine Research Veröffentlicht: 2026-06-01 DOI: 10.1016/j.imr.2026.101385 ISSN: 2213-4220 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-07-23
